name: helius-docs
description: Search and retrieve content from the Helius developer documentation: RPC methods, DAS API reference, Laserstream guides, and Phantom Connect integration patterns.
instructions: Use this MCP when answering Solana developer questions that benefit from current Helius documentation. Call lookupHeliusDocs with a topic, method name, or feature area to retrieve the canonical content from docs.helius.dev. Call listHeliusDocTopics first if the user's question is broad and you need to pick a topic. All tools are read-only and safe to call without confirmation.

tools.name: lookupHeliusDocs
tools.description: Look up Helius developer documentation by topic, method name, or feature area.

topic.description: A topic, method name, or feature area to look up (e.g. 'getAssetsByOwner', 'webhooks', 'laserstream pricing').

tools.name: listHeliusDocTopics
tools.description: List the available top-level documentation topics on docs.helius.dev.

resources.name: Solana dApp Example — full reference
resources.description: Complete reference documentation for the Helius Solana dApp Example: tech stack, architecture, API routes, code patterns.

resources.name: Demo proxy OpenAPI 3.1 spec
resources.description: Machine-readable description of the demo's HTTP surface (RPC proxy, Enhanced API proxy, Laserstream SSE, NLWeb /ask).
